case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. ROBERT WILLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ROBERT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-21-2009

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ROBERT $8,560.23 PRINCIPAL, $262.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,822.73, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION RE VENUE; CICIL CASE COVER SHEET; ADR NOTICE AND INFORMATION PACKAGE., PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK SERVED JUN-27-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ROBERT
DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $216.23 AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ROBERT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $262.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ROBERT
